title: sceptridium obliquum var. intermedium
intro: Sceptridium obliquum var. intermedium, also known as the Chinese parasol or Asian parasol, is a type of plant belonging to the family Asparagaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Sceptridium obliquum var. intermedium include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, it is often used in combination with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be dried and made into capsules or tablets.
